communications.message: We are investigating reports of customers being unable to log into the security portal. Login attempts may fail with authentication errors. Our threat detection and email processing systems remain fully operational and continue protecting your environment. We are actively investigating the cause and will provide an update within 15 minutes.

We have identified an issue with our authentication infrastructure that is preventing portal logins. Our team is working to restore service. Importantly, all threat detection and email processing continue to operate normally—your security coverage is not affected. We expect to have this resolved within 30 minutes and will provide another update shortly.

Our team has implemented a fix and portal authentication is being restored. We are monitoring login success rates as they return to normal levels. Threat detection remained fully operational throughout this incident. We will confirm full resolution shortly.

This incident has been resolved. Portal login functionality has been fully restored and is operating normally. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

Incident Summary:
- Start time: ~2:10 AM PT
- Resolution time: 3:00 AM PT
- Duration: Approximately 50 minutes
- Impact: Portal login unavailable; threat detection and email processing remained fully operational throughout
